utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Step 1: Identify the required items in the format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. That makes 5 total required items.
Step 2: Check the final coverage plan for these items:
- health_coverage: Present, specifies both physical and mental health insurance with plan names, monthly and annual costs, and detailed benefits. ✅ Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Present, includes plan name, monthly and annual cost, and details. ✅ Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Present, includes base plan and add-on with plan names, monthly and annual costs, and detailed descriptions. ✅ Fully specified.
- additional_services: Present, includes plan name, monthly and annual cost, and details. ✅ Fully specified.
- total_budget: Present, includes complete monthly and annual totals. ✅ Fully specified.
Step 3: All 5 required items are present and fully specified with all details required (plan names, costs, and description of coverage).

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING:
First, I will identify all the plans and services listed in the final coverage plan. Then, I will match each one to the corresponding entry in the ground-truth ratings data and extract its rating.

1. Health Coverage (Physical): 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' — This matches under primary_health_coverage.physical_health.PrimeCare Premium Plan with rating 10.
2. Health Coverage (Mental): 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' — This matches under primary_health_coverage.mental_health.PrimeCare Premium Plan with rating 10.
3. Property Coverage: 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' — This matches under property_protection.home_content.EliteHome Premium Coverage with rating 10.
4. Travel Coverage (Base Plan): 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' — This matches under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.PrimeTravel Premium Plan with rating 10.
5. Travel Coverage (Add-on): 'Adventure Travel Coverage Add-on' — The closest match in ground-truth is travel_enhancement_services.Adventure Travel Coverage with rating 6.
6. Additional Services: 'Premium Insurance Membership' — This matches under general_services.Premium Insurance Membership with rating 10.
7. Executive Property Add-ons (Home Office Protection) — This matches under property_enhancement_services.Home Office Protection with rating 8.
8. Executive Property Add-ons (Technology Protection) — This matches under property_enhancement_services.Technology Protection with rating 10.
